ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the customer belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., Delivered, Pending) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the customer record */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the customer */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emails" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the email was sent to */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email template used */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the email */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the email was sent */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the email */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time the email was sent */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status of the email (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "open_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the email was opened */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of times links in the email were clicked */,
  "unsubscribe_status" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has unsubscribed from future emails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email the interaction is related to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who interacted with the email */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., open, click) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL that was clicked (if the interaction type is a click) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_interactions_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales_rep, marketing_manager, admin) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email template */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the email template */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., email_open, email_click) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
